title: 天皇賞（春）の後に・足りない欠片

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tokai Teio shows what she's made of and beats
Mejiro McQueen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Taking this achievement into account, I decide
the next race she should enter is the Japan Cup.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Several days later, Tokai Teio spots Mejiro
McQueen training ferociously. She admires her
tenacity. However...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Teio is confident that no matter how many times
they race, she'll always win. Symboli Rudolf, on
the other hand, disagrees.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Rudolf's statement throws Teio and her efforts to
work toward the Japan Cup into a tailspin.
